      About this product

      Effortlessly prepare smoothies, fresh juices, and nutritious blends within seconds, perfect for busy mornings or quick refreshments. Versatile design allows you to dry grind spices, make chutneys, sauces, and creamy dips with smooth consistency. Built with a high-performance 500W pure copper motor, delivering powerful grinding and long-lasting durability for everyday use. Includes a lightweight, easy-to-carry sipper jar, making it simple to blend, take, and enjoy your drinks on the go.
